_documentation.description: Información detallada de todos los 184 productos (nombre, descripción, especificaciones)
_documentation.usage: Página de detalle /product/:id, tarjetas de producto, resultados de búsqueda
_documentation.structure: Cada producto contiene: name, description, specs (array de 5 detalles)

sillon_gris.description: A contemporary gray armchair that is versatile and timeless. It adapts to any decorating style while offering superior durability for daily use.

sillon_verde.name: Olive Green Nordic Armchair
sillon_verde.description: A Nordic-style olive green armchair made with sustainable materials. It brings a touch of nature and freshness to your home without compromising on style.

sofa_cama_blanco.name: White Sofa Bed
sofa_cama_blanco.description: A white sofa bed where functionality and design come together in this versatile piece that easily transforms to welcome guests with maximum comfort.
specs: Material: Wood structure and soft fabric

sofa_gris.name: Gray Sofa
sofa_gris.description: A contemporary gray sofa with a robust structure and extra soft cushions, the perfect choice for endless streaming sessions and family relaxation.
specs: Material: Reinforced structure and durable fabric

sofa_media_luna.name: Crescent Sofa
sofa_media_luna.description: A sofa with an innovative crescent moon design. Ideal for creating warm and dynamic conversation spaces in large living rooms.
specs: Material: High-density foam and premium fabric

sofa_negro.name: Black Sofa
sofa_negro.description: An elegant black sofa with premium finish and sophisticated lines that bring a touch of industrial luxury to any modern living room or office.
specs: Material: Premium synthetic leather and metal

sofa_verde.name: Emerald Green Sofa
sofa_verde.description: A spacious emerald green sofa that stands out with its vibrant color and capacity to accommodate the whole family with style.
specs: Material: Emerald green velvet and noble wood

sopita_dona_gallina.name: Dona Gallina Seasoning Cubes
sopita_dona_gallina.description: Dona Gallina is one of the most popular chicken seasonings in Dominican cooking. It gives your dishes the homemade, authentic flavor everyone loves.
specs: Use: Soups, rice dishes, and stews

tablet_apple.name: Tablet Apple
tablet_apple.description: The Apple Tablet combines exceptional performance, high-resolution display, and smooth experience designed for working, studying, and enjoying multimedia content with best-in-class quality.
specs: Seamless ecosystem with iCloud and App Store

tablet_rted.name: Tablet RTED
tablet_rted.description: The RTED Tablet offers reliable performance with excellent smoothness for multitasking. Perfect for studying, working, and enjoying multimedia content thanks to its high-definition display, efficient processor, and portable design.
specs: Ideal for browsing and educational apps

tablet_samsung.name: Tablet Samsung
tablet_samsung.description: The Samsung Tablet is an excellent choice for those seeking performance, smoothness, and high-quality display. Perfect for studying, working, and enjoying multimedia content thanks to its modern design, durable battery, and Samsung ecosystem.

tablet_tcl.name: Tablet TCL
tablet_tcl.description: The TCL Tablet offers an excellent balance between performance and portability. Ideal for studying, working, or enjoying multimedia content thanks to its bright display, efficient processor, and long battery life.

tablet_tecnomaster.name: Tablet Tecnomaster
tablet_tecnomaster.description: The Tecnomaster Tablet is ideal for users seeking an excellent balance between performance, portability, and daily-use features. Designed for studying, working, and consuming content with smoothness and great battery life.

televisor_led_50.name: TV LED 50 Inches
televisor_led_50.description: The 50-inch LED TV offers an excellent visual experience thanks to its wide display, intense colors, and sharp resolution. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or spaces where you want a large display with great performance.

televisor_led_lg.name: TV LED LG
televisor_led_lg.description: The LG LED TV offers sharp imagery with realistic colors thanks to its advanced LED panel. It features Smart TV system to access your favorite apps and modern design that adapts to any space.
specs: IPS panel technology for better viewing angles

televisor_led_samsung.name: TV LED Samsung
televisor_led_samsung.description: The Samsung LED TV offers clear and vibrant visual experience, ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or entertainment spaces. With Full HD/4K quality (depending on model) and access to smart apps, it's perfect for enjoying your series, games, and movies.
specs: Vibrant colors with Crystal LED technology
Single remote for all your devices
Automatic gaming mode for better smoothness

televisor_led_tecnomaster.name: TV LED Tecnomaster
televisor_led_tecnomaster.description: The Tecnomaster LED TV combines good image quality with elegant design. Its LED panel offers intense colors, excellent brightness, and sharpness. Perfect for enjoying your shows, movies, and favorite content with stable performance.

televisor_samsung_75_pulgadas.name: TV Samsung 75 Inches
televisor_samsung_75_pulgadas.description: The Samsung 75-inch TV offers an impressive visual experience with Ultra HD 4K resolution, vibrant colors, and advanced image technologies. Ideal for large rooms, gaming, and home cinema.
specs: HDR technology for more realistic colors
Smart TV with access to your favorite apps
Refined design that complements any space

thera_gesic.name: Thera-Gesic Analgesic
thera_gesic.description: Thera-Gesic is a topical analgesic cream that penetrates deeply to relieve muscle and joint pain instantly.

theraflu.name: Theraflu
theraflu.description: Theraflu is a medication designed to relieve cold and flu symptoms, providing fast relief and comfort day and night.

tilapia_roja.name: Red Tilapia
tilapia_roja.description: Fresh red tilapia, rich in protein and low in fat. Perfect for steamed, fried, or broth-based dishes. A healthy and delicious option.

toma_corriente.name: Toma Corriente
toma_corriente.description: Toma corriente doble of pared with design modern and safety mejorada for tu home u office.

tomates_de_ensalada.name: Salad Tomatoes
tomates_de_ensalada.description: Fresh salad tomatoes, red and juicy. A staple ingredient in salads and Mediterranean-style dishes.

tomates_pelados_la_famosa.name: La Famosa Peeled Tomatoes
tomates_pelados_la_famosa.description: La Famosa Peeled Tomatoes come whole in their natural juice. Perfect for sauces, stews, and soups with a homemade flavor.

traje_2_piezas.name: 2-Piece Suit
traje_2_piezas.description: A 2-piece suit that combines elegance and comfort. Includes jacket and pants made of high-quality materials, perfect for formal events and special occasions.

traje_azul.name: Blue Suit
traje_azul.description: A blue suit that combines elegance and comfort. Includes jacket and pants made of high-quality materials, perfect for formal events and special occasions.

traje_completo.name: Complete Suit
traje_completo.description: A complete suit that combines elegance and comfort. Includes jacket, pants, and vest made of high-quality materials, ideal for gala events.

traje_elegante.name: Elegant Suit
traje_elegante.description: An elegant suit that stands out for its premium finish. Ideal for those seeking distinction and exclusivity in every detail for their most important moments.
specs: Fabric with subtle and sophisticated finish

traje_negro.name: Black Suit
traje_negro.description: The black suit is the definition of sobriety and style. An indispensable piece for evening events and formal dress codes.

tubo.name: Tubo de Drenaje
tubo.description: Tubo of PVC of alta presion for drenaje and systems sanitarios, lightweight and facil of cortar e instalar.

tulipanes.name: Artificial Tulip Bouquet
tulipanes.description: A decorative arrangement of realistic artificial tulips. Enjoy the beauty and elegance of tulips all year long without requiring any care.

tylenol.name: Tylenol Pain Reliever
tylenol.description: Tylenol is effective for relieving mild to moderate pain. Safe and reliable for daily use according to package directions.

Benefits: Pain relief, safe, reliable, and easy to use

uvas_moradas.name: Purple Grapes
uvas_moradas.description: Purple grapes are sweet and refreshing. A delicious fruit to enjoy as a snack or in juices and special desserts.

vaporizing.name: Vaporizing Analgesic
vaporizing.description: Vaporizing is a topical ointment that helps relieve nasal congestion and cough, while also providing relief for minor muscle pain.

ventilador_daiwa.name: Daiwa Fan
ventilador_daiwa.description: The Daiwa Fan provides fresh, quiet airflow for any room. Perfect for keeping your home comfortable on hot days.

ventilador_de_techo_kdk.name: Ceiling Fan KDK
ventilador_de_techo_kdk.description: The KDK Ceiling Fan provides wide, efficient airflow throughout the room. With a modern design and quiet motor, it is ideal for living rooms and bedrooms.

ventilador_kdk.name: KDK Fan
ventilador_kdk.description: The KDK Fan is known for its durability and powerful airflow. A reliable and affordable option for cooling any space.

ventilador_pequeno.name: Small Fan
ventilador_pequeno.description: A compact small fan ideal for desks, bedside tables, or tight spaces. Portable and easy to move anywhere in the home.

vestido_ajustado.name: Fitted Dress
vestido_ajustado.description: A fitted dress that enhances your figure with sophistication. Its modern design and elastic material ensure an impeccable fit for unforgettable evenings.
specs: Fitted cut that enhances the silhouette
Ideal for dinners and evening events

vestido_cuello_cuadrado.name: Square Neckline Dress
vestido_cuello_cuadrado.description: A dress with a square neckline that combines classic aesthetics with a modern touch. Its flattering design is ideal for social events and special occasions.
specs: Ideal for day or night parties

vestido_de_invierno.name: Winter Dress
vestido_de_invierno.description: A winter dress designed to provide warmth without sacrificing elegance. Perfect for maintaining your style during the coldest seasons.

vestido_elegante.name: Elegant Dress
vestido_elegante.description: An elegant dress that is the ultimate expression of style. Crafted with attention to detail, it's the perfect piece to shine at galas and receptions.

vestido_negro.name: Black Dress
vestido_negro.description: The classic black dress is versatile and timeless. A must-have that offers instant elegance for both cocktail events and formal dinners.

vinagre_baldom.name: Baldom Vinegar
vinagre_baldom.description: Baldom Vinegar is an everyday white vinegar used in Dominican cooking. Ideal for dressings, preserves, and cleaning vegetables.

vitafusion.name: Vitafusion Multivitamin
vitafusion.description: Vitafusion offers vitamins in gummies for adults, a delicious and easy way to supplement your daily diet without pills.

vitaminac.name: Vitamin C
vitaminac.description: Vitamin C strengthens the immune system and acts as a powerful antioxidant to protect your body's cells.

yogurt_fresa_yoka.name: Yoka Strawberry Yogurt
yogurt_fresa_yoka.description: Yoka Strawberry Yogurt is creamy and delicious. Made with real strawberry pieces, it is a perfect snack for both kids and adults.

yogurt_natural_rica.name: Rica Plain Yogurt
yogurt_natural_rica.description: Rica Plain Yogurt has no added sugar and is full of probiotics. Perfect for a healthy diet, on its own or mixed with fruit.

zanahorias.name: Carrots
zanahorias.description: Fresh carrots, crisp and rich in beta-carotene. Perfect for salads, juices, or as a healthy snack.
